title: Blepharitis follow-up

referral.text: Supports clinician-led referral, worsening, vision change, severe redness, severe pain, photophobia, spread, trauma, uncertain diagnosis, and refractory-symptom documentation without automatically concluding urgency.
referral.rationale: Supports worsening, vision change, pain, photophobia and referral context for blepharitis follow-up; no decision is generated.
referral.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-led referral, worsening, vision change, severe redness, severe pain, photophobia, spread, trauma, uncertain diagnosis, and refractory-symptom documentation without automatically concluding urgency.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Swollen Eyelid – 40

follow_up.text: Supports blepharitis identity, watery or red eyes, gritty, burning, stinging, greasy, itchy, swollen or crusted eyelids, light sensitivity, eyelid observation, and clinician-documented eyelid-hygiene discussion.
follow_up.rationale: Supports blepharitis identity, symptoms, eyelid observation and hygiene discussion for blepharitis follow-up; no decision is generated.
follow_up.evidence_extract: Supports blepharitis identity, watery or red eyes, gritty, burning, stinging, greasy, itchy, swollen or crusted eyelids, light sensitivity, eyelid observation, and clinician-documented eyelid-hygiene discussion.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Eye and lids, duration, crusting, burning, itch, dryness, vision, contact lenses, examination, hygiene, treatment and response are absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for blepharitis follow-up.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
